descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg2] {Pierce DMG} [Arg1] {plural:[Arg1]|time|times} to a random enemy, and inflict {Poison} with [Arg3]% DMG. If Arithmetica is insufficient, it can be played forcefully, andthe effect changes to gaining [Energy:Arg4] Aliemus and {Exhaust} after played.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg2] {Pierce DMG} [Arg1] {plural:[Arg1]|time|times} to a random enemy, and inflict [Arg3]% DMG {Poison}. At turn end, if in hand or {Ultra Space}, upgrade to {Deadly Flames}. Can be played with insufficient Arithmetica, changing its effect to Gain [Energy:Arg4] Aliemus and {Exhaust}.
